text: - Hello. - What's so important? Medicaid? - Good morning. My name is Cassie. So I'm calling because your Medicare member profile hasn't been transferred into Medicare's national database for 2020. - I do not have Medicare. - When that transfer is missing, it can cause delays in your coverage approvals. I can verify it real quick. So you do have both part A and part B, right? - How many times have I got to tell you guys? No, I don't. - Sorry, we don't need to qualify for the plans. - No, sure, sure. - We have a great day.
